title: King Tara
overview: In a kingdom teetering on the brink of betrayal, Princess Tara is thrust into the perilous world of rebellion, compelled to join forces with a clandestine group to reclaim her usurped throne. Yet, as suspicions of her allegiance surface within the deceptive corridors of the King's Court, she is assigned Sir Morgan, a valiant knight whose unwavering duty becomes entwined with the unraveling threads of trust, leaving Tara torn between a mysterious protector and the looming shadows of an uncertain fate.
